film_room_lessons.title: Film Room: Pain Does Not Change the Plan
film_room_lessons.subtitle: Big moments still want your normal move.

steps.title: Film Room: Pain Does Not Change the Plan
steps.content: World Series Game 1 - Dodgers vs Athletics (1988). Watch the moment through the Clutchr lens: one read, one decision, one takeaway.

data.event: World Series Game 1 - Dodgers vs Athletics
data.setup: Watch for the baseball behavior before the highlight result.
data.question: Why does this at-bat still look mechanically quiet under max pressure?

choices.label: He hunted a pitch he could handle and did not let pain or crowd volume speed him up.
He sold out because the moment was huge.
Big moments need a harder swing.

data.coach_breakdown: Pressure did not create the swing. It exposed a prepared swing.
data.takeaway: Big moments still want your normal move.

feedback.correct: Pressure did not create the swing. It exposed a prepared swing.
feedback.wrong: Rewatch the clip. The highlight is not the lesson; the decision before it is.

steps.title: Takeaway
steps.content: Big moments still want your normal move.

feedback.complete: Big moments still want your normal move.

film_room_lessons.asset_rights_note: External official/archive video. Store URL, fallback URL, reliability, and replacement notes. Verify embed behavior before publish.

film_room_lessons.title: Film Room: One Swing Ends It
